summary: Completed testing of notification system improvements. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Core UI flows verified for notifications and send-notification pages.

integration_issues.issue: Auth session may not persist across full page reloads in Expo web - requires same-page navigation to maintain login state

issues: Firebase 'Missing App configuration' toast appears at bottom - expected since push notifications are MOCKED

critical_code_review_comments: Firebase push notifications are MOCKED (no FCM credentials) - in-app notifications work correctly via MongoDB
Permission check for send-notification page works correctly - shows lock icon for unauthorized users
Notifications are saved for ALL target users, not just FCM token holders
seed_data_creation: TEST notifications created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend notification APIs are fully functional. Frontend requires login first, then navigate to /notifications or /send-notification pages using in-app navigation (not URL reload) to maintain session. Firebase push notifications are MOCKED - only in-app notifications work.

verified_features.POST /api/notifications/send: PASS - sends to all users, returns users count
verified_features.DELETE /api/notifications/{notification_: PASS - deletes notification for current user
verified_features.GET /api/notifications/my: PASS - returns notifications with id, title, message, type, is_read, created_at
verified_features.Send notification page permission check: PASS - shows lock icon for non-admin users
verified_features.Send notification form: PASS - has target picker, title, message, send button
